name: Herbag leather satchel
description:
Product Details: Pink Hermès Toile Herbag Zip 31 Satchel. The Herbag Zip 31
features a canvas body, a flat leather top handle, a flat leather shoulder
strap, a front leather flap with pull-through strap closure, an exterior back
zip pocket, and a detachable interior zip pouch. 10.2" L x 12.2" W x 4.3" D,
3.1" drop. Serial number ▢P.

Condition: Pre-owned. Good. Exterior Back Scratched, Worn. Exterior Back stained
with Other. Exterior Bottom stained with Other. Exterior Corners Worn. Exterior
Front Scratched, Worn. Exterior Front stained with Other. Exterior Handle
Creased, Scratched, Worn. Exterior Handle stained with Other. Interior Lining
Scratched. Interior Lining stained with Other. Practical Attachment Scratched.
Exterior Side Scratched. Exterior Side stained with Other. Exterior Top
Scratched. Exterior Top stained with Other. Zipper Scratched.
